Mentions Timeline (5 articles)
3301-11-18
Sirius Corporation Programme Ends Today
Sirius Corporation's economic revitalisation initiative for HIP 8396 concludes successfully after hundreds of miners delivered osmium to Stepping Stone Base; CEO Li Yong-Rui praises contributors and hints at the next multi-system initiative.
3301-11-12
Sirius Corporation Programme Begins Today
Sirius Corporation launches an initiative to boost the economy of HIP 8396 through an osmium delivery request, as part of broader efforts to revitalise newly acquired systems.
3301-11-05
Sirius Corporation Programme Begins Today
Sirius Corporation launches an economic revitalisation initiative for HIP 8396, requesting osmium deliveries to boost the system's financial rejuvenation.
3301-10-15
Sirius Corporation Announces New Programme
Sirius Corporation CEO Li Yong-Rui announced ambitious revitalization plans for systems brought under corporate control earlier in the year, including HIP 8396, Almagest, Sothis, Ceos, and Robigo. The initiatives rely on independent pilots and contractors, beginning with an appeal for osmium deliveries to HIP 8396. Economist Roberta Unwin characterized this as speculative expansion.
3301-03-12
Launching the Colonies
